title: Carry out cash and non-cash payment operations
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out cash and non-cash payment operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Handle cash and non-cash payment transactions

pcs.text: Determine transaction amount taking into account factors that impact on the balance 1.2 Receive and count cash, and give change1.3 Process credit and debit card transactions using required equipment and according to financial provider and workplace procedures 1.4 Receive cheques and examine for correctness1.5 Store cash, cheques and credit and debit card records according to workplace procedures1.6 Note and refer irregularities to supervisor for resolution1.7 Issue receipts and document transactions according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine transaction amount taking into account factors that impact on the balance 1.2 Receive and count cash, and give change1.3 Process credit and debit card transactions using required equipment and according to financial provider and workplace procedures 1.4 Receive cheques and examine for correctness1.5 Store cash, cheques and credit and debit card records according to workplace procedures1.6 Note and refer irregularities to supervisor for resolution1.7 Issue receipts and document transactions according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine transaction amount taking into account factors that impact on the balance 1.2 Receive and count cash, and give change1.3 Process credit and debit card transactions using required equipment and according to financial provider and workplace procedures 1.4 Receive cheques and examine for correctness1.5 Store cash, cheques and credit and debit card records according to workplace procedures1.6 Note and refer irregularities to supervisor for resolution1.7 Issue receipts and document transactions according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Handle cash and non-cash payment transactions

elements.title: Carry out invoicing procedures

pcs.text: Determine invoicing requirements and perform calculations to produce customer invoices2.2 Complete documentation and check content for accuracy2.3 Distribute invoices to required persons or section for verification and approval prior to being dispatched2.4 Dispatch approved invoices within designated timeframes2.5 File invoice copies for auditing purposes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine invoicing requirements and perform calculations to produce customer invoices2.2 Complete documentation and check content for accuracy2.3 Distribute invoices to required persons or section for verification and approval prior to being dispatched2.4 Dispatch approved invoices within designated timeframes2.5 File invoice copies for auditing purposes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine invoicing requirements and perform calculations to produce customer invoices2.2 Complete documentation and check content for accuracy2.3 Distribute invoices to required persons or section for verification and approval prior to being dispatched2.4 Dispatch approved invoices within designated timeframes2.5 File invoice copies for auditing purposes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out invoicing procedures

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
